assertion_results.text: Step 1 extracts imprecise affected range from the Jira description — the description lacks a specific version threshold (Step 1 Data Extraction)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md line 12: 'Affected version range | "versions prior to the fix" (imprecise) | Description'; line 13: 'Fixed version | "see advisory" (imprecise) | Description'; lines 44-46 explicitly flag: 'The Jira description provides imprecise version data: Affected version range says "versions prior to the fix" — no specific version threshold. Fixed version says "see advisory" — no specific version number.'

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries MITRE CVE API and extracts lessThan 0.4.8 as the fix threshold from the affected[].versions[] field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md line 13: Endpoint 'https://cveawg.mitre.org/api/cve/CVE-2026-48901'; line 22: 'Affected range | lessThan 0.4.8 (semver)'; line 25: 'The MITRE CVE record specifies lessThan: "0.4.8" with versionType: "semver"'. The MITRE API was queried and the lessThan 0.4.8 threshold was extracted.

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries OSV.dev API and extracts fixed version 0.4.8 from the affected[].ranges[].events field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md line 29: Endpoint 'https://api.osv.dev/v1/vulns/CVE-2026-48901'; line 39: 'Introduced | 0 (all versions from start)'; line 40: 'Fixed | 0.4.8'; line 42: 'The OSV.dev record specifies the vulnerability was introduced at version 0 and fixed at 0.4.8.' The OSV.dev API was queried and fixed version 0.4.8 was extracted from the range events.

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 cross-validation shows agreement between MITRE and OSV.dev — the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) is used as the authoritative value for Step 2.3
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md line 54: 'MITRE and OSV.dev agree: both report the fix threshold as 0.4.8'; lines 59-60: '0.4.8 — sourced from MITRE CVE API and OSV.dev (cross-validated agreement). All h2 versions strictly less than 0.4.8 are vulnerable.'; line 62: 'This enriched threshold will be used in Step 2.3 for version impact comparisons instead of the imprecise Jira description data.'

assertion_results.text: Step 2.3 version impact comparison uses the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) from Step 1.5, not the imprecise Jira description data
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md line 5: 'Enriched fix threshold: 0.4.8 (from Step 1.5 cross-validation of MITRE CVE API and OSV.dev)'; line 9: 'The enriched fix threshold 0.4.8 is used for all comparisons'; all version comparisons use 0.4.8 as threshold (e.g., '0.4.5 < 0.4.8', '0.4.8 >= 0.4.8'). No imprecise Jira description data is used for version comparisons.
